title: Online Learning: School from Home
passage:
Learning from Home

Today, many students learn from home. This is called online learning or distance education. Instead of going to a physical school building every day, students use computers, tablets, or smartphones to study. This way of learning is becoming very popular all over the world.

To study online, students need a good internet connection. They also need a quiet place in their house to focus. Many students study in their bedrooms or at a desk in the living room. They log in to a special website every morning. On this website, they can see their teachers and classmates. They can watch videos, read digital books, and complete their homework.

Online learning has many advantages. First, students do not need to travel. They can save time and money because they do not take buses or cars to school. Second, they can often study at any time. Some students like studying in the morning, and others like studying in the afternoon. Third, students can learn at their own speed. If a lesson is difficult, they can watch the video lesson again.

However, online learning also has some problems. Some students feel lonely because they do not see their friends in person. They cannot play games together in the playground during break times. Also, sitting in front of a computer screen for a long time can make their eyes tired. Some students find it hard to focus because there are many distractions at home, like television, video games, or pets.

Teachers also work very hard in online classes. They make interesting slideshows and find fun online games. They want to help their students enjoy learning even when they are not in a traditional classroom. Parents also help a lot by checking their children's work and making sure they study every day.

questions.instruction: Choose the correct letter, A, B, or C.
questions.text: What do students use to study online?
questions.explanation: Đoạn 1 viết rõ: 'students use computers, tablets, or smartphones to study.' Do đó B là đáp án đúng.

questions.instruction: Choose the correct letter, A, B, or C.
questions.text: Why do students save time and money with online learning?

options.A: Because they do not buy food at school
options.B: Because they do not take buses or cars to school
options.C: Because they do not need to buy computers

questions.explanation: Đoạn 3 viết: 'They can save time and money because they do not take buses or cars to school.' Do đó B là đáp án đúng.

questions.instruction: Choose the correct letter, A, B, or C.
questions.text: What makes some students feel lonely?

options.A: They do not see their friends in person
options.C: They do not like their teachers

questions.explanation: Đoạn 4 viết: 'Some students feel lonely because they do not see their friends in person.' Do đó A là đáp án đúng.

questions.instruction: Choose the correct letter, A, B, or C.
questions.text: What can make students' eyes tired?

options.B: Sitting in front of a computer screen for a long time
options.C: Sleeping too much in the afternoon

questions.explanation: Đoạn 4 viết: 'sitting in front of a computer screen for a long time can make their eyes tired.' Do đó B là đáp án đúng.

questions.instruction: Do the following statements agree with the information given in the Reading Passage? Write TRUE, FALSE, or NOT GIVEN.
questions.text: Students need a good internet connection to study online.
questions.explanation: Đoạn 2 viết: 'To study online, students need a good internet connection.' Thông tin trùng khớp hoàn toàn.

questions.instruction: Do the following statements agree with the information given in the Reading Passage? Write TRUE, FALSE, or NOT GIVEN.
questions.text: All online students prefer to study in the morning.
questions.explanation: Đoạn 3 viết: 'Some students like studying in the morning, and others like studying in the afternoon.' Nghĩa là không phải tất cả đều thích học buổi sáng.

questions.instruction: Do the following statements agree with the information given in the Reading Passage? Write TRUE, FALSE, or NOT GIVEN.
questions.text: Students can play games with their classmates in the playground during online break times.
questions.explanation: Đoạn 4 viết: 'They cannot play games together in the playground during break times.' Thông tin trái ngược hoàn toàn.

questions.instruction: Do the following statements agree with the information given in the Reading Passage? Write TRUE, FALSE, or NOT GIVEN.
questions.text: Most teachers prefer teaching online to teaching in a physical classroom.
questions.explanation: Bài đọc chỉ nói giáo viên làm việc chăm chỉ trong các lớp học trực tuyến ('Teachers also work very hard in online classes...') chứ không so sánh họ thích phương pháp nào hơn.

questions.instruction: Choose NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS from the passage for each answer.
questions.text: Every morning, students log in to a special ________ to see their teachers and classmates.
questions.explanation: Đoạn 2 viết: 'They log in to a special website every morning. On this website, they can see their teachers and classmates.'

questions.instruction: Choose NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS from the passage for each answer.
questions.text: It is difficult for some students to focus because there are many ________ at home.
questions.explanation: Đoạn 4 viết: 'Some students find it hard to focus because there are many distractions at home...'

questions.instruction: Choose NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS from the passage for each answer.
questions.text: ________ help by checking their children's work and ensuring they study daily.
questions.explanation: Đoạn 5 viết: 'Parents also help a lot by checking their children's work and making sure they study every day.'

vocabulary.meaning: giáo dục từ xa, học trực tuyến không cần đến trường trực tiếp
lợi ích, điểm tốt, thuận lợi
cô đơn, cảm giác một mình
những thứ gây mất tập trung (như TV, đồ chơi, thú cưng)
lớp học truyền thống (học trực tiếp tại trường học vật lý)

tactics:
Hướng dẫn làm bài đạt điểm cao (A1-A2)

1. Tìm từ khóa trực tiếp: Ở trình độ này, các câu hỏi hầu như không paraphrase nhiều. Hãy tìm đúng từ xuất hiện trong câu hỏi (ví dụ: 'internet connection', 'lonely', 'website') trong bài đọc để tìm ra đoạn chứa đáp án nhanh nhất.

2. Chú ý giới hạn từ: Với phần điền từ (Sentence Completion), hãy nhớ quy định 'NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS'. Chỉ điền từ chính xác có trong bài đọc, không tự ý đổi dạng từ (ví dụ: giữ nguyên 'website', 'distractions').

3. Phân biệt FALSE và NOT GIVEN: Nếu bài đọc nói ngược lại hoàn toàn với câu hỏi, chọn FALSE. Nếu bài đọc hoàn toàn không nhắc đến thông tin hoặc sở thích/so sánh đó, hãy chọn NOT GIVEN.
